text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. Instead of just reading words, NLP allows machines to grasp the meaning behind text. For example, it powers translation tools that change one language into another while keeping the original sense. NLP also performs sentiment analysis, which can detect whether a review is positive or negative. Additionally, chatbots use NLP to have conversations with people, answering questions or providing customer support. As a result, NLP makes it easier for humans and technology to communicate naturally.
